programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Andrew, Melissa, Alex and Linda pit their wits against quiz genius the Chaser. Answering general knowledge questions, they each add as much money as they dare to the jackpot - but if anyone is caught they're out for good, leaving fewer players for the final chase

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: After Belle has a quiet word with Lisa at the Dingles, Paddy convinces her to work one last shift at the vets alongside Jamie - but things soon turn nasty. Liv tries to convince her brother that Ben seems a decent guy and Bear reveals the nature of Chas and Al's growing closeness to Marlon

programme.title: Tonight
programme.desc: As Britain braces itself for a difficult winter with Covid-19 cases on the rise again, Adam Shaw asks how the country is coping with new lockdowns, track-and-trace and a fragile economy. He also hears from frontline workers, central in the fight against the disease

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nate tries to encourage a drained Belle to stay positive after a meeting with their solicitor, but Belle's voices try to convince her that Andrea is to blame for everything she's going through. Mandy and Leyla come up with an agreement and Aaron's feeling sorry for himself

programme.title: The Martin Lewis Money Show: Live
programme.desc: The financial expert is joined by Angellica Bell for another round of advice on family finances, jobs and consumer rights, including Martin's topical briefing and tips on making money go further

programme.title: The Savoy
programme.desc: The staff prepare to let their hair down at their annual gala, where they celebrate their most profitable year and busiest season. It's also where the prestigious Front of House star award will be announced - and concierge Dean, who has been nominated, practises his dance moves in between dealing with guests. Meanwhile, Savoy Grill director Thierry prepares for another visit from owner Gordon Ramsay and quality executive Debra does her daily rounds to check things are in perfect condition. But there is a crisis looming as news of Covid-19 reaches the hotel

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Exposure
programme.desc: This summer more than 6,000 people are estimated to have made perilous journeys across the Channel packed into flimsy dinghies, most intending to claim asylum in the UK. Adnan Sarwar reports on the smuggling gangs making huge profits by putting desperate people onto the English Channel. He unpicks the gangs' operations, identifies the key individuals and reveals the wider network that handles the illegal payments - before finding himself witness to clandestine crossings as they're launched from French beaches

programme.title: John Bishop's Great Whale Rescue
programme.desc: Part one of two. The comedian follows the journey of two beluga whales being released from captivity in an entertainment park in China and returned to the ocean. John's mission starts when he flies to Shanghai and visits the Beluga Theatre at Changfeng Park, where Little Grey and Little White have spent every day for the last 10 years performing for the crowds

programme.title: The Singapore Grip
programme.desc: Walter spots an opportunity to turn a tragic situation to his advantage. programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie sets a plan against Belle in motion, Leyla and Gabby plan something big and ambitious, and Dan's determined to start providing for his family again

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mick and one of his sidekicks turn up at the furniture store and threaten Gary, believing him to be in cahoots with Todd, while David is forced to take Shona to work with him - with disastrous consequences. Evelyn and Arthur plan a camping trip to Norfolk and Billy reveals to Paul that the bishop has recommended he apply for the position of archdeacon

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates when a seemingly beloved resident of a coastal community is fatally driven off the road, and realises she has to dig up the victim's past to have any chance of unmasking the killer. Joined by her faithful team, including DC Kenny Lockhart and new recruit DC Jac Williams, Vera attempts to find the missing link that will crack the case, but finds it difficult to get to the truth when everyone they encounter seems to be protecting a secret. Crime drama based on Ann Cleeves' series of novels, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: John Bishop's Great Whale Rescue
programme.desc: Part two of two. John's mission to return Little White and Little Grey from captivity to the Icelandic beluga whale sanctuary continues, as the pair begin the 6,000-mile journey to reach their new home. Following the previous delays in China, the release is already two months behind schedule, and as autumn approaches the whales have little time to put on enough weight and acclimatise to the cold water they will face in the bay

programme.title: Jonathan Ross' Comedy Club
programme.desc: Jonathan and his co-host comedian Mawaan Rizwan welcome some of the UK's best new stand-ups to the comedy club, including the hilarious Aurie Styla, Fern Brady and Babatunde Aléshé. Plus, special guest Russell Kane will be trying out some new material

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy tries various ways to get the money together and Paul wonders how he can help, while Aaron has an altercation with Ben's friend and leaves. Marlon is shocked when Bear tells him Chas was caught flirting with Al, and Vinny is stunned by what he discovers about Liv

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: George reveals his plan to stage a mock funeral so that Mick will think Todd is dead, and the Platts prepare for Audrey's belated 80th birthday party. Tyrone is puzzled when Evelyn and Arthur return back early from the Lakes with a story full of holes, and Scott orders Johnny to meet him to talk him through his plan

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. Vietnam Airlines are battling baggage woes in the lead up to the busy holiday period, and rookie engineer Mo comes up with an ingenious solution to ensure no one is ever stranded abroad without their luggage

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todd puts Eileen in danger when he lets himself into Number 11 and starts searching for her cash, while Gary tells Ray that the factory is not for sale. Scott tells Johnny that his job is to drive the getaway car and if he doesn't comply, he'll reveal all to Jenny, and Evelyn tells Arthur that she's sorry she ruined their trip with her sleeping arrangements

programme.title: The Savoy
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse into the lives of those lucky enough to check into the glamorous London hotel, and those who serve them. This time, the hotel hosts a series of BAFTA-related events, which sees a multitude of celebrities and film stars from across the globe coming in and out of the hotel. Head butler Sean shows newest butler Michael the ropes about discretion and how to look after the hotel's most important guests

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Political magazine show presented by Robert Peston, featuring major interviews with MPs, topical guests and cultural figures. Including updates from social media taking in perspectives from viewers, experts and key players throughout the programme

programme.title: UEFA Nations League Highlights
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch presents action from the fourth round of fixtures, including England v Denmark at Wembley Stadium, Scotland v Czech Republic at Hampden Park, Bulgaria v Wales at Vasil Levski National Stadium and Norway v Northern Ireland at Ullevaal Stadion. With analysis from Roy Keane and Ian Wright and commentary by Sam Matterface, Lee Dixon, Joe Speight, Seb Hutchinson, Joshua Adu-Donkor and Tom Gayle

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads towards Louisiana's swamplands, where he ditches his car for a high-speed boat. Then, he travels to the nearby city of Lafayette, where he visits the family run smokehouse, Johnson's Boucaniere, and samples some of their traditional homemade sausage. James also tries ice cream from the legendary Borden's ice cream parlour, before heading back to the swamps to cook one final dish

programme.desc: Todd puts Eileen in danger when he lets himself into Number 11 and starts searching for her cash, while Gary tells Ray that the factory is not for sale. programme.desc: Samantha from London dines with three lucky lads. When the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, it remains to be seen who she will choose

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: After Belle has a quiet word with Lisa at the Dingles, Paddy convinces her to work one last shift at the vets alongside Jamie - but things soon turn nasty. Liv tries to convince her brother that Ben seems a decent guy and Bear reveals the nature of Chas and Al's growing closeness to Marlon

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nate tries to encourage a drained Belle to stay positive after a meeting with their solicitor, but Belle's voices try to convince her that Andrea is to blame for everything she's going through. Mandy and Leyla come up with an agreement and Aaron's feeling sorry for himself

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a selection of home-video funnies, including naughty children, an ice-cream-loving donkey and a baby who gives his dad a nosebleed. Plus holiday horrors and school-play disasters caught on camera

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Stephen Twitch Boss steps in for Ellen, taking his place in the presenter's chair.

programme.title: Ellen's Game of Games
programme.desc: Volunteers from Ellen's studio audience play her outrageously fun games including Danger Word, Blindfolded Musical Chairs, Don't Leave Me Hanging and Say Whaaat?

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Luke from Southampton selects three blind dates from five potential partners, based on the menus they have created. After dining with them, he decides who he wants to see again

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Londoner Frankie puts her faith in the fashion choices of three single men - but only one will win a date with her

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Bentley, mechanic David, army paramedic Nick and dancer Josh enter the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval. Host Paddy McGuinness presides over the matching process, and also catches up on the latest developments from all the couples in Fernando's as the dating game bows out for another series

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden is looking forward to meeting Zoey's parents over Christmas. However, a visit from his own mother brings early childhood memories to the surface and his reaction is less than merry. Comedy, starring Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden's mother teams up with Bridget to take over his company, but he refuses to give up control easily and appoints Alan as a member of the board to help defend his interests. American comedy, starring Ashton Kutcher and Jon Cryer

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diets with the help of Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie's view of Meg changes when she saves him from a choking incident and he makes it his mission to create a better life for her. Meanwhile, Chris is sent to a vocational school

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan begins to worry that Hayley has failed to develop any life skills, so he forces her to get a job and start paying rent. After she secures a position as a bartender at Roger's Place, Stan uses his daughter in an effort to reach Bullock's inner circle, turning her into a helpless drunk. Meanwhile, Klaus shares German folk tales with Steve and Snot

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Francine wishes to relive her kids' childhoods with a family trip to a theme park, but disaster strikes when the cryonically-frozen founder of the attraction is mistakenly thawed out and takes them prisoner in the Medieval area

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Lester appears to take his own life after losing his savings when he invests in Cleveland's beer truck business. Meanwhile, tired of having his hair cut by his mother, Rallo opens a barbershop in the kitchen

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Donna becomes jealous when a slimmer, prettier version of Cleveland's former school friend 'Fatty Patty' turns up and reveals she has a crush on him. However, the newcomer goes crazy and tries to steal Cleveland's 'essence', forcing Donna to intervene

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden is looking forward to meeting Zoey's parents over Christmas. However, a visit from his own mother brings early childhood memories to the surface and his reaction is less than merry. Comedy, starring Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: The Stand Up Sketch Show
programme.desc: Routines by comedians including Stephen Bailey, Tom Allen, Felicity Ward and Joel Dommett are reconstructed as sketches

programme.title: ITV2 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des tries to apologise to Derek. Deirdre tells Alec he's upsetting Roy. Vera worries when money goes missing from the till. Ken is horrified when Kelly agrees to work for Denise

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Joyce apologises to the Malletts for misleading them. Ken and his solicitor meet with Denise to discuss custody of Daniel. Liz visits Steve and asks him to help put Fraser off

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tony wants to know where Will has disappeared to. Sarah drags Rachel out for a night out. Terry gets jealous of Alan's relationship with Jo

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will tries to make an escape from the barn. Zoe tells Dee that Eric has been taking pig steroids. Becky calls the police about Will's disappearance

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of youths push Peggy down a hole while she's poaching. Lord Ashfordly alerts Miller, who gives chase - but lands himself in trouble when he knocks down an elderly pedestrian. However, the incident gives Peggy a new money-making idea - she'll sue for the 'injury' she sustained in the fall. Meanwhile, Gina is attracted to her handsome college tutor. Tim Brooke-Taylor and Murray Head guest star

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's desire to play the guitar proves too much for his flatmates. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin is struggling to live off his student grant, so the girls find a way for him to earn hard cash. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida is confident she can settle a mix-up over Robert's birthday

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour detective Jack Frost investigates a woman's near-fatal shooting. The victim was all set to testify against a notorious drugs baron accused of murdering one of his employees, but the appearance of a contract killer makes her think again - and it appears someone on Jack's team is leaking information. Meanwhile, the station is turned upside down in the hunt for a missing lottery ticket. David Jason, Michael McKell and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of elderly villains spot a chance for one last, glorious crime spree when the villagers leave Aidensfield en masse to support Rob in a charity football match. Peg finally gives David a bit of support when it turns out his jury duty is more trouble than he imagined. Rural police drama, starring Sophie Ward, Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor and David Lonsdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Fiona taunts Will by telling him she spent the night with his family. Steve demands to know what Kim has been doing with the company money. Rachel tells Kathy about her and Jack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is confident that his dad will find him. Rachel finds Sarah in tears over Jack's behaviour. Chris attempts to blackmail Kim over the missing money

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec plants marked £5 notes in his coat pocket at work. Samantha is interested to hear Sean has dumped Liz. Liz visits Fraser and tells him to stop hounding her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Martin wants to buy Curly's car for Gail to learn to drive in. Anne and Vera organise a party for Curly. Don is hurt when Sarah Louise tells him he's not invited for Christmas

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The investigation of a burglary at a quarry turns into something far more serious when a security guard's badly beaten body is discovered at the scene of the crime. An autistic teenager is arrested for the murder, despite Inspector Frost's misgivings - a move which triggers a chain of tragic events culminating in a tense stand-off. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Caroline Harker and Maurice Roeves

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's investigation into the death of a nameless Russian leads to a mysterious military facility run by Colonel Harry Galt, a respected soldier with an impeccable war record. However, as Foyle makes inquiries, he realises the deceased was a spy with dangerous connections to British Intelligence. Meanwhile, Sam does her best to help husband Adam during his by-election campaign, but can't help putting her foot in it. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Jonathan Hyde and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Sunny makes further investigations into David Walker's life that suggest he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Cassie has a prickly chat with Marion about her past and the inquiry reveals her close relationship with an IRA activist. As the police investigation encroaches on their life, Sara and Colin open up to their partners with secrets about their past. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Wendy Craig and Holly Aird

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.desc: The flatmates come up with a new rule to give their romantic pursuits a chance of privacy - but it means giving 24 hours' notice. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Robin find a rare plant in the Ropers' garden. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Helen is accused of helping an elderly, terminally ill patient to die, a problem compounded by the strain of concealing her relationship with Rob. Meanwhile, Peggy and David go into business selling stolen strawberries - unaware that Geoff Younger is hot on their trail. Rural drama, with Sophie Ward, Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor, David Lonsdale and Steven Blakeley

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris demands his cheque for £350,000 from Kim. Tony feels Will's disappearance is something to do with his past catching up with him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will pleads with Fiona to let him go. Tony tells Becky what happened in Guatemala. Tara tells Alex that Kim has made a fool of them. Zoe shocks Linda by admitting she wants a baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don is depressed over being breathalysed as he knows he'll lose his job. Judy and Gary fly to Marbella. Jack is horrified to discover Alec has been working at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don is consumed by despair. Jack fears Alec wants his empire back. Curly and Maureen share a bottle of wine

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy investigate the death of amateur artist Ruth Fairfax, whose body has been discovered by Joyce - but the more they delve into the dead woman's background, the more mysterious she becomes. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, with guest appearances by John Sessions and Leslie Phillips

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack learns he is tipped for promotion with the uniform branch and even more flattered to discover he has a secret admirer, but before he has time to bask in this rare moment of glory a child murder claims his attention. Linking the disappearance of a 10-year-old boy to a mysterious hit-and-run killing, he is soon mired in a complex investigation and fuming about a bureaucratic blunder that leaves a known paedophile walking free on his patch. David Jason stars

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Chief Superintendent Jack Cornish goes missing and a recently embalmed body is discovered near an isolated farm track - could there be a link? As Hathaway goes on sabbatical in Kosovo, Lewis takes an awkward young constable under his wing to investigate the case. Guest starring Lucy Speed and Peter Davison, with Kevin Whately and Babou Ceesay

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Marion jeopardises her marriage by refusing to open up about the past to her husband, Colin is blackmailed even further and the secrets of Sara's past push her family to breaking point. A disturbing allegation about David opens up a second line of inquiry, and when Tessa is called in for questioning again it threatens to ruin her relationships with her husband and son. Cold-case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Rosie Cavaliero, Mark Bonnar, Badria Timini and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Belgian sleuth's Cornish holiday comes to a dramatic conclusion as he unravels the mystery behind the series of disastrous near-misses that placed the life of a beautiful heiress in danger, and as the truth comes to light, a secret engagement is revealed. David Suchet stars, with Philip Jackson and Hugh Fraser

programme.desc: Mr Roper decides he will not allow the flatmates to have a party. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

David Jason stars

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The folk of Aidensfield panic when rumours of an escaped killer are confirmed. Rob attempts to track down the fugitive, but his investigations are complicated when Helen gets caught up in the case. David is left reeling when Greengrass's lurcher Alfred becomes seriously ill, and Peggy speaks to bereavement expert Bernie in the hope that he can lend support to the devastated handyman. Rural drama with David Stockwell

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris winds Kim up about paying him the money she owes. Fiona is determined to make Tony suffer. Becky figures out Fiona's riddle and she and Tony rush to find Will

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Becky and Tony are shocked to find Fiona and Will holding hands. Rachel hands in her notice at the farm. Will loses all respect for Tony when he hears the truth about Guatemala

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen regrets her night of passion with Curly. Don refuses to be pampered by the Platts. Liz worries over Steve and fears Fraser might be using him to get to her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera gets emotional at the thought of Curly leaving. Don refuses to talk to a doctor. Emily lures Curly to the Rovers where all the residents throw a surprise party for him

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A stately home is turned into a theme park celebrating the work of local horror writer Ellis Bell, but the opening ceremony is marred by the death of a film star. Barnaby and Troy's investigation uncovers the secrets within an eccentric family, and a centuries-old village feud comes under the spotlight. Murder mystery, written by Alan Plater and guest starring Beth Goddard

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack returns to duty after a period of suspension, and finds himself investigating the murder of a man who had been leading a double life. In addition, he also has to deal with the baffling case of a man found dead with his right foot hacked off and replaced by a severed left foot. Drama, starring David Jason and Amanda Root

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa and Martin search for a nursery now that Janice has left, and Mrs Tishell is shocked to find out that Al has very high blood pressure. Louisa also helps with the diagnosis of a pupil, which spurs her on to explore the possibilities of a change of career. This is not welcome news for Martin, who dislikes any kind of change, even if it could be for the better. Elsewhere, Ruth is approached about selling her farm. Starring Martin Clunes, Caroline Catz, Selina Cadell and Ian McNeice

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The curmudgeonly GP is perturbed when he discovers Louisa, who is already spending much of her time away from home, has applied to take up a child and adolescent counselling course. However, achieving a work-life balance is far from the greatest of concerns for some of the Ellinghams' neighbours, not least of whom is Al, whose plans to demonstrate his business acumen are placed in jeopardy when Ken decides to close the pub. Unless Ruth agrees to serve as a guarantor, Ken will not allow Morwenna and Al to take over the establishment, so the pair arrange a race-walking event to raise funds and prove the community is on their side

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Cassie turns her attention to Brentford house and the theory that one or more of the suspects may have been abused at the gatherings there. Marion is questioned again after Sinead's allegation that David could have been an IRA target. The detectives also look further into the accusations made against Colin while he was working in the city - but something does not quite seem to add up. Was his alleged victim telling the truth - and if not, why would she lie? Cold-case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: With the suspects in the murder of David Walker all having either a motive, opportunity or connection to the victim, Cassie and Sunny are left with a massive puzzle to solve. Cassie soon focuses in on Sara, whose alibi seems too perfect, as if it has been put together by an accomplice of the ex-prostitute - and the team is soon investigating the possibility of a wider revenge plan. Meanwhile, interviews with Colin and Marion's loved ones prove revealing. Cold case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Badria Timimi, Mark Bonnar and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack learns he is tipped for promotion with the uniform branch and even more flattered to discover he has a secret admirer, but before he has time to bask in this rare moment of glory a child murder claims his attention. Linking the disappearance of a 10-year-old boy to a mysterious hit-and-run killing, he is soon mired in a complex investigation and fuming about a bureaucratic blunder that leaves a known paedophile walking free on his patch. David Jason stars

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Chief Superintendent Jack Cornish goes missing and a recently embalmed body is discovered near an isolated farm track - could there be a link? Guest starring Lucy Speed and Peter Davison, with Kevin Whately and Babou Ceesay

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Marion jeopardises her marriage by refusing to open up about the past to her husband, Colin is blackmailed even further and the secrets of Sara's past push her family to breaking point. A disturbing allegation about David opens up a second line of inquiry, and when Tessa is called in for questioning again it threatens to ruin her relationships with her husband and son. Cold-case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Rosie Cavaliero, Mark Bonnar, Badria Timini and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part two of two. David Suchet stars, with Philip Jackson and Hugh Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A stately home is turned into a theme park celebrating the work of local horror writer Ellis Bell, but the opening ceremony is marred by the death of a film star. Barnaby and Troy's investigation uncovers the secrets within an eccentric family, and a centuries-old village feud comes under the spotlight. Murder mystery, written by Alan Plater and guest starring Beth Goddard

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack returns to duty after a period of suspension, and finds himself investigating the murder of a man who had been leading a double life. In addition, he also has to deal with the baffling case of a man found dead with his right foot hacked off and replaced by a severed left foot. Drama, starring David Jason and Amanda Root

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa and Martin search for a nursery now that Janice has left, and Mrs Tishell is shocked to find out that Al has very high blood pressure. Louisa also helps with the diagnosis of a pupil, which spurs her on to explore the possibilities of a change of career. This is not welcome news for Martin, who dislikes any kind of change, even if it could be for the better. Elsewhere, Ruth is approached about selling her farm. Starring Martin Clunes, Caroline Catz, Selina Cadell and Ian McNeice

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The curmudgeonly GP is perturbed when he discovers Louisa, who is already spending much of her time away from home, has applied to take up a child and adolescent counselling course. However, achieving a work-life balance is far from the greatest of concerns for some of the Ellinghams' neighbours, not least of whom is Al, whose plans to demonstrate his business acumen are placed in jeopardy when Ken decides to close the pub. Unless Ruth agrees to serve as a guarantor, Ken will not allow Morwenna and Al to take over the establishment, so the pair arrange a race-walking event to raise funds and prove the community is on their side

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Cassie turns her attention to Brentford house and the theory that one or more of the suspects may have been abused at the gatherings there. Marion is questioned again after Sinead's allegation that David could have been an IRA target. The detectives also look further into the accusations made against Colin while he was working in the city - but something does not quite seem to add up. Was his alleged victim telling the truth - and if not, why would she lie? Cold-case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: With the suspects in the murder of David Walker all having either a motive, opportunity or connection to the victim, Cassie and Sunny are left with a massive puzzle to solve. Cassie soon focuses in on Sara, whose alibi seems too perfect, as if it has been put together by an accomplice of the ex-prostitute - and the team is soon investigating the possibility of a wider revenge plan. Meanwhile, interviews with Colin and Marion's loved ones prove revealing. Cold case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Badria Timimi, Mark Bonnar and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: Licence to Kill (1989)
programme.desc: While on leave to attend the wedding of his friend, CIA agent Felix Leiter, James Bond is asked to help with a secret mission to capture notorious drug baron, Franz Sanchez. Though successful, Sanchez later escapes and seeks revenge on Leiter, killing his new bride and leaving Leiter for dead. Incensed by this, Bond refuses his next mission from MI6 to go in search of Sanchez, leaving M with no alternative but to revoke Bond's licence to kill. Now considered a rogue agent, Bond goes undercover to pose as an assassin for hire within Sanchez's drug empire, to bring him down from the inside. Spy thriller, starring Timothy Dalton, Robert Davi, Carey Lowell, Talisa Soto and Benicio Del Toro

Incensed by this, Bond refuses his next mission from MI6 to go in search of Sanchez, leaving M with no alternative but to revoke Bond's licence to kill. Now considered a rogue agent, Bond goes undercover to pose as an assassin for hire within Sanchez's drug empire, to bring him down from the inside. Spy thriller, starring Timothy Dalton, Robert Davi, Carey Lowell, Talisa Soto and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Licence to Kill (1989)
programme.desc: While on leave to attend the wedding of his friend, CIA agent Felix Leiter, James Bond is asked to help with a secret mission to capture notorious drug baron, Franz Sanchez. Though successful, Sanchez later escapes and seeks revenge on Leiter, killing his new bride and leaving Leiter for dead. Incensed by this, Bond refuses his next mission from MI6 to go in search of Sanchez, leaving M with no alternative but to revoke Bond's licence to kill. Now considered a rogue agent, Bond goes undercover to pose as an assassin for hire within Sanchez's drug empire, to bring him down from the inside. Spy thriller, starring Timothy Dalton, Robert Davi, Carey Lowell, Talisa Soto and Benicio Del Toro

programme.desc: Following three patients who have miraculously survived when the odds were stacked against them, including a motorcyclist who was thrown under a car after crashing into a bus. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty-four-year-old plumber Jamie hasn't had a proper girlfriend for almost 10 years. His date, Leigh, is seeking someone muscley and good with his hands. Shelly is a 57-year-old personal trainer who has been single for seven years. Her date is David, a 61-year-old retired firefighter who's been single for four years. Father-of-two Nathan has had a successful career in sales. His date Lisa seeks someone 'nicer' than the guys she usually dates. Last into the restaurant is 27-year-old steampunk enthusiast Joe. His date is 29-year-old Jess, who used to work at the Black Country Living Museum

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Twelve strangers come together on a lakeside in the beautiful British countryside to try to win a life-changing sum of money. A prize of £100,000 lies on an island in the lake and the 12 must build an 850-foot bridge by hand within 20 days to reach it. In the first episode, the 12 get to know each other, including Billie, the daughter of TV presenter Trisha Goddard, Covid-19 survivor Tara, and the oldest member of the team, 60-year-old Sly. The team attempt to come up with a plan to build the bridge, but tempers quickly fray over who should lead the group

programme.title: Angry, White and American
programme.desc: Journalist Gary Younge journeys across the United States to explore the issue of race, talking only to white Americans to understand why many of them have been sent into angry retreat. He drives from Maine to Mississippi - both cities left behind by disappearing jobs and epidemic levels of drug abuse - and explores why Donald Trump's appeal to white people to help him secure victory in the former democratic heartlands resonated so much

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: The concluding part of the documentary charts Donald Trump's life from the turn of the millennium, when he was still overspending and still the punchline to many a joke. He eventually reined in his playboy lifestyle and returned to the public eye with his hit TV show The Apprentice. But his political ambitions would have to wait several years. However, when he did finally take the ultimate prize, would anyone still be amused?

Mo features pioneers of the scene such as Angie Le Mar, the veteran comic from The Real McCoy who was the first female black comedian to have a sell-out show in London's West End. programme.title: First Dates

Shelly is a 57-year-old personal trainer who has been single for seven years. Her date is David, a 61-year-old retired firefighter who's been single for four years. Father-of-two Nathan has had a successful career in sales. His date Lisa seeks someone 'nicer' than the guys she usually dates. Last into the restaurant is 27-year-old steampunk enthusiast Joe. His date is 29-year-old Jess, who used to work at the Black Country Living Museum

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The civilisation of Panem is consumed by a bloody civil war. Reluctant rebel leader Katniss Everdeen leads a band of her allies on a mission to end the conflict at one stroke by assassinating the despotic President Snow - but faces many dangers as she closes in on her target. Conclusion of the sci-fi adventure series based on Suzanne Collins' novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman in his final role

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of the week's dinner parties in Medway, Kent, is hosted by experimental cook and retired grandmother Nina Gaskell. Her guests are barmaid Laura Leibo, police worker Esther Kennedy, mortgage adviser Michael Dodsworth and art graduate Patrick Fysh, and she hopes to impress them with her unusual dishes including a cucumber stuffed with corned beef, and gravy with coconut

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Laura Leibo hosts the second party in Medway, Kent, but struggles to cope with the stresses of the task. She hopes her improvised cheesecake and questionable gravy will be forgotten when she invites her guests to take part in a robotic dance-off in her kitchen - with Nina Gaskell grabbing the opportunity to show off a hidden talent

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police communications officer Esther Kennedy hosts the third dinner party in Medway, Kent. She has very high standards and believes everything has to be just so, with nice cutlery, matching plates and impeccable glassware. But the key thing is her gourmet menu, which may or may not prove a hit with her fellow diners. However, Esther does end the night by treating her guests to an impromptu rock performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Patrick Fysh hosts the fourth dinner party in Kent, and hopes to impress with his molecular gastronomy. However, Michael Dodsworth is confused by the 21-year-old's interest in surrealist feminist art, and Nina Gaskell is left speechless by risque pictures of his girlfriend

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Dodsworth hosts the final dinner party in Medway, Kent, and decides to keep his menu simple by preparing Thai chicken cakes, jambalaya and raspberry and lime sorbet. He also arranges games including pinata, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.desc: Renovation specialist Shannon Hughes is forced to turn private detective once again when Mac, her new sweetheart, moves to Lighthouse Cove and buys the derelict lighthouse manor for which the town is named. As a spot of demolition work gets under way, the bones of a teenage girl who went missing 15 years ago are uncovered, and if Shannon has any chance of completing her job on time, she will need to tackle this cold-case herself. Light-hearted mystery drama sequel, starring Jewel Kilcher

programme.title: Walking Britain's Roman Roads
programme.desc: Dan Jones travels the historic Roman road of Ermin Way, which links the two Roman towns of Calleva Atrebatum and Glevum, now known as Silchester and Gloucester. Not to be confused with Ermine Street, which runs from London to York, Ermin Way is arguably Britain's most industrial Roman road

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: In February 2020, Prince Charles and Camilla, Duchess of Cornwall visit the Tower to celebrate the Yeoman Warders' anniversary, the first time Prince Charles has visited the Tower in over a decade. Meanwhile, the business of researching the Tower's history goes on for Chief Curator, Tracy Borman, as she digs into the tragic story of Henry VIII's fifth wife, Catherine Howard

programme.title: Henry VIII: Rise of a Tyrant
programme.desc: Three-part drama-documentary series revealing the truth about England's most infamous King, King Henry VIII. Filming in historic locations including Hampton Court, Windsor Castle and the Vatican and unearthing new documents never seen before on TV, a team of Tudor experts uncover the real Henry, and explore how his complex personality fundamentally shaped the nation. In the first episode, experts examine how Henry VIII's traumatic childhood affected his personality, from the death of his older brother to the tragic early death of his beloved mother. Narrated by Jason Isaacs

programme.title: Dando: 20 Year Hunt for a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary re-examining the case of Jill Dando's murder, the BBC presenter who was mercilessly shot dead as she entered her Fulham home in April 1999. Two years after her death, Barry George was found guilty of her murder, but following a dramatic retrial in 2008, he was acquitted and released from prison. Now more than 20 years on, this programme looks back at some of the unanswered questions surrounding the case

programme.title: Rhys Jones: 5 Clues That Caught His Killer
programme.desc: Documentary examining the investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones, a schoolboy shot dead on his way home from football training in 2007. The programme looks at how police managed to make the vital breakthroughs that finally put Rhys' killer behind bars, featuring interviews with police officers and specialists directly involved in the case

programme.title: Extreme Nightmare Tenants
programme.desc: Lancashire letting agent Paul Ainsworth Lord has a run-in with a tenant while carrying out a routine inspection on a property - leading to a three-month stand-off. Harrow Council housing officers investigate a residential property being used as a brothel and a Lincolnshire pub owner calls in a lawyer when his tenant, who manages the pub, stops paying rent

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: In one of the biggest engineering projects of the Middle Ages, Salisbury Cathedral was moved from a wind-blasted Iron Age hill fort to its current location - a feat accomplished in just 38 years, helping establish the Wiltshire city in the process. A place of both ancient tradition and home to one of the country's oldest choirs, Tony witnesses the ritual of inducting a new chorister and sees the oldest working clock in the world. The presenter also reflects on the cathedral's role in a clandestine operation that helped turn the tide of the Second World War

programme.title: Divine Designs

He then views more pre-Reformation treasures in Ranworth, Norfolk, where the church has a finely painted rood-screen and an altar dedicated to women

programme.title: QE2: The World's Most Luxurious Hotel
programme.desc: Life aboard the most famous ocean liner in the world, now a floating hotel in Dubai. Bigger than Titanic, she transported rock stars and royalty and sailed over six million miles, circumnavigating the globe 25 times before being retired. With more than 100 five-star hotels, competition in the Dubai hotel market is fierce and though millions have already been spent on her refurbishment, she's still only 40 per cent complete. In this episode, the first VIP guests are due to check in and top chef Dino and his team have a big event planned - a traditional Burns night supper for 200 guests

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The doctors treat a number of patients who have already sought help for their problems online. A health app has recommended that Maryam, who is experiencing dizzy spells and bloating, should be screened for irritable bowel syndrome, while Paul says that Google has told him his sleeping difficulties and loud snoring are caused by sleep apnoea. Depression sufferer Tina returns to the surgery for advice from Dr Wyne

programme.title: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year-old Lesley is rushed in when her heart stops while she is driving to work, leaving Dr Morris battle to resuscitate her and investigate why a normally fit and well woman with no known medical problems would suffer such an attack. Abigail, aged 20, is treated for a painful neck injury caused by a riding fall, and 28-year-old Laura is brought in having a severe asthma attack. It is clear to Dr Fawcett she is deteriorating fast and that her heart could stop at any moment

programme.title: Miscarriage: Our Story
programme.desc: One in four pregnancies ends in miscarriage, but those affected rarely talk about it, even to their partners and closest friends. In this poignant documentary broadcast on International Pregnancy and Infant Loss Remembrance Day, nine women and men, including broadcaster Natasha Kaplinsky, actresses Lacey Turner and Jane Danson, violinist Izzy Judd, and journalists Anna Whitehouse and Matt Farquharson, recall their personal stories of the day they lost their babies

programme.title: Police Suspect No 1
programme.desc: After a raid on a cannabis factory, nine people are arrested and it is up to the team at Norwich CID to get to the bottom of which role each suspect played. In the interview room, different stories emerge and the detectives face a daunting challenge to determine who is telling the truth and who is spinning lies

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

One question remained, however. Where was the second body?

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor visits York Minster, which over the past 800 years, has been a backdrop to some of the most dramatic events in British history. It houses more than half of all the world's medieval glass, including the Rose Window, commissioned by Henry VIII, and the East Window, the largest stained glass window in the world. A succession of outspoken bishops of York have defied Nazis, married kings and queens, and more recently championed equality with Archbishop John Sentamu, the country's first black bishop, consecrating the world's first female bishop, Libby Lane, in 2014.

programme.desc: Craig Charles is challenged to fit another bit of cutting-edge smart home tech to his humble abode - this time voice-operated blinds. Jordan Erica Webber lands herself the ultimate flight simulator rig to give Microsoft's latest edition of their flying game series a thorough shakedown. Jon Bentley jumps into the world of online video, testing out of the latest vlogging tech with YouTube star TechFlow. Plus, it's Georgie Barrat's turn to travel back to a tech year in time

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian explores Grampian and the Central Highlands, going behind the region's most iconic sights to see what the tourists miss - and unearth the hidden gems in her home country. She begins her journey in Perthshire at Blair Castle, which has a unique claim to fame as the home of Europe's only private army. From there, Susan travels to Invergordon, where she goes underground to explore an amazing feat of wartime engineering and the home of a world record-breaking echo. In the Cairngorms, the comedian meets a special and charming group of animals - Britain's only wild reindeer herd

programme.title: Friday on the Farm
programme.desc: Farmers Rob and Dave welcome some rare breed sheep to their ever-extending flock - and face a race against time to keep a newborn alpaca alive and kicking. Plus, Clifford the hairy mangalitsa pig is moved to his new 'forever home' on a West Yorkshire rescue farm, and cameras catch up with the family whose members have taken the phrase 'farm to fork' in a very literal sense. Presented by Helen Skelton and Jules Hudson

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: A look at the business of high-end hospitality, going behind the scenes at the Kempinski Adlon in Berlin, where guests want the best food, decor, and out-of-this world service. Staff are put through their paces by hotel manager Carsten Seubert as he strives to provide the very best for their wealthy clientele, with former guests including the Queen, Barack Obama and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey (2015)
programme.desc: A naive young literature student's life is thrown into turmoil by an affair with a mysterious billionaire. Initially she is intrigued by his aloof and distant manner, but soon realises he is harbouring dark secrets and desires. Erotic drama based on EL James' bestseller, starring Jamie Dornan and Dakota Johnson

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey (2015)
programme.desc: A naive young literature student's life is thrown into turmoil by an affair with a mysterious billionaire. Initially she is intrigued by his aloof and distant manner, but soon realises he is harbouring dark secrets and desires. Erotic drama based on EL James' bestseller, starring Jamie Dornan and Dakota Johnson

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Mind the Age Gap
programme.desc: As the cross-generational house guests continue their attempts to get along, it is not long before the arguments turn from political to personal, opening old wounds and creating new rifts. Fresh alliances form - but are they determined by age? Brexit supporter Dee is left feeling isolated after clashing with Eddie, while Tyrrel is feeling more settled - until another late-night argument jeopardises her place in the community

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A special episode to mark International Dog Day, in which Julian faces the challenge of having to perform surgery on his own four-legged friend Emmy - who is not too keen on needles. Peter removes a tumour from a Great Dane's leg, and a spaniel is rushed in with her side ripped open on a barbed wire fence. Julian pays a visit to a sheepdog whose broken leg he fixed with a metal plate - and which he now has to take out again

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Dr Paul Binski investigates places of worship designed by Christopher Wren after the Great Fire of London in 1666. Assigned to rebuild 51 of the city's churches, he created a trademark open, auditorium-style feel to emphasise the shift from Catholic to Anglican dominance

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Californian interior designer and estate agent Ann Maurice visits a five-bedroom house on the market in Northwich, Cheshire, and advises the owners on making it more attractive to would-be buyers

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneer's loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMille's classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: Tulsa (1949)
programme.desc: A cattle magnate's ambitious daughter alienates her friends with her single-minded pursuit of wealth as she attempts to fend off the unwanted attentions of greedy oil barons intent on stealing her land. Drama, starring Susan Hayward, Robert Preston, Pedro Armendariz and Lloyd Gough

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017)
programme.desc: Grieving mother Mildred Hayes has suffered an unimaginable personal loss, and hatches an idea that drags the residents of Ebbing, Missouri into a maelstrom of revenge. She pressures Sheriff Bill Willoughby and his forces into continuing the investigation into her daughter's murder. It becomes an obsession that has dramatic repercussions for all of the locals. Martin McDonagh's Bafta and Oscar-winning crime drama, starring Frances McDormand, Sam Rockwell and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Why Him? (2016)
programme.desc: A protective dad is far from thrilled when his daughter begins dating a foul-mouthed playboy millionaire, who has made his fortune with the kind of technology that is driving their own old-fashioned printing company out of business. A holiday gathering threatens to go off the rails when he realises the object of her affections is about to pop the question. Comedy, starring Bryan Cranston, James Franco and Zoey Deutch

programme.title: Entertainment (2015)
programme.desc: A middle-aged comedian plays a string of dead-end shows in the Mojave desert en route to meeting his estranged daughter. Drama, starring Gregg Turkington, with John C Reilly, Tye Sheridan and Annabella Lwin

programme.title: Moonrise (1948)
programme.desc: A man is haunted by the fact that his late father was a murderer, something no-one will ever let him forget. His problems are further compounded when he accidentally kills a man in self-defence - and realising people will think it was malicious, he decides to hide the body. Drama, starring Dane Clark, Gail Russell and Ethel Barrymore

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Only the Brave (2017)
programme.desc: Eric Marsh, the superintendent of a group of elite firefighters, is pushed to his limit when he and his crew tackle a historic wildfire. Fact-based drama, starring Josh Brolin, Jennifer Connelly and Andie MacDowell. Directed by Joseph Kosinski, helmer of Tron: Legacy and Top Gun: Maverick

programme.title: Sweet Country (2017)
programme.desc: An aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defence and goes on the run as a posse gathers to hunt him down. Australian period drama, starring Hamilton Morris, Bryan Brown and Sam Neill

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: My Name Is Joe (1997)
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic becomes romantically involved with a health service worker as he struggles to resist the temptation of the bottle - but their burgeoning relationship begins to falter when his willpower fails and he falls off the wagon. Drama, directed by Ken Loach and starring Peter Mullan, Louise Goodall, David McKay and Anne Marie Kennedy

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A gunslinger determined to track down his father's killer is badly wounded and taken in by a Quaker family, whose daughter nurses him back to health. His attraction to the girl and growing respect for the family's peaceful way of life lead him to consider renouncing violence - but his desire for revenge proves hard to surrender. Western, starring John Wayne, Bruce Cabot and Gail Russell

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Book Thief (2013)
programme.desc: A girl separated from her family is raised by foster parents in Nazi Germany, who instill in her a love of reading. She is horrified by the book burnings and tries to save volumes from the flames, while she and her adoptive family provide a safe hiding place for a Jewish boy. Drama based on Markus Zusak's novel, starring Sophie Nelisse, Geoffrey Rush and Emily Watson

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova

programme.title: Ghost in the Shell (2017)
programme.desc: A cybernetically enhanced soldier designed to battle the world's deadliest criminals faces a new threat - a terrorist who has developed the ability to hack into people's minds and control them. The mission brings to light disturbing secrets about her own past, and the possibility that her whole life is a lie. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Pilou Asbæk and Juliette Binoche

programme.title: The Handmaiden (2016)
programme.desc: A conman posing as a count hires a petty criminal to help him marry a Japanese heiress by becoming her handmaiden and persuading her to accept his proposal. Psychological thriller based on Sarah Waters' bestselling novel Fingersmith, starring Kim Min-hee, Kim Tae-ri, Ha Jung-woo and Cho Jin-woong. In Korean and English

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry enlists his friends to help him break up Beverly's social group in order to get more of his mother's attention, but when big arguments ensue he realises he's made a major error. Adam's attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre backfire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj accepts Sheldon's offer to work for him as he is desperate to avoid being sent back to India. Howard starts spending more time with Leonard and Penny, who would rather be left alone. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part three of three. The team at the precinct go on a road trip to help Peralta and Holt take down crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis, but the plan is hindered by an unforeseen injury and an interruption by Sheriff Reynolds. In the middle of the chaos, Santiago and Peralta share an awkward reunion

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In a New Girl crossover episode, Peralta runs into Jess Day, who is visiting New York from Los Angeles, and enlists her help on his latest case. Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale as they come to terms with being on the night shift, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk. Zooey Deschanel (New Girl) and Matt Walsh (Veep) guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon visits the California Institute of Technology for the very first time. Georgie is furious when Mary listens in on a phone call with his girlfriend, while Meemaw tries to cheer up a jealous Missy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis is furious when Sheldon accuses him of plagiarism. Mary sets out to find a suitable 'girl trophy' for Missy's end-of-season baseball ceremony, and Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with new girlfriend Jana

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is bothered by the attention he receives in the wake of his heavy element discovery, but is taken aback when his work is disproved by Leonard. Meanwhile, Raj makes Howard and Bernadette feel inadequate when he stays with them for a week and is the perfect house guest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD learns Dr Cox has tampered with a dead patient's medical insurance in a bid to help a more needy case, and Carla is delighted with a pen given to her by Turk - until she finds out where he got it. Comedy, with Zach Braff, John C McGinley and Ken Jenkins

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Elliot takes care of a patient whose jaw has been wired shut and Turk spends the night with Carla, while JD sleeps with an important board member - only to discover she is Dr Cox's former wife. Comedy, guest starring Christa Miller Lawrence, with Zach Braff and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Jimmy is upset that the kids no longer want to participate in the family tradition of dressing up for Halloween, so Maya tries to cheer him up by allowing him to do things he loves. Meanwhile, Ray recruits Dylan to help run the school's haunted mansion

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Despite Beverly's wishes, Jackie's parents allow Adam to watch horror movie A Nightmare on Elm Street, and a family disagreement ensues. Meanwhile, Erica starts hanging out at her old high school and soon realises she's not as popular as she once was

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to help Sheldon when he starts to wonder whether he is wasting his time studying string theory. Meanwhile, during a dinner, Raj discovers Howard once embarrassed himself on a date with Emily. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard try to distract Sheldon from his career woes by reinstating Anything Can Happen Thursday, but it causes friction among the gang when Amy and Bernadette are caught lying. Meanwhile, Raj seeks Howard's help in preparing for a date with Emily. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part two of three. Buffy obtains a powerful magical axe, and puts it to good use saving the potentials who fell into the First's trap. Taking charge once more, she tells Xander to take Dawn out of harm's way, whether she wants to go or not. As Buffy tries to uncover the origin and purpose of her new weapon, it leads to a showdown with Caleb - and a reunion with an old friend

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Rogue Slayer Faith arrives in LA, and Attorneys from Wolfram & Hart make plans to use her in their fight against Angel. Supernatural drama, with guest star Eliza Duskhu

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Unimpressed with what's on television, Rick hacks into the family's cable TV box and upgrades their viewing package to access programming from infinite realities. However, when Jerry, Beth and Summer use Rick's inter-dimensional goggles to view themselves in parallel timelines, it has a bad effect on family relationships

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Capturing the households' instant reactions to what they are watching on TV, including The Big Audition, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve, The Great British Bake Off, Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild, Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's Mysterious World of Maths, and Gordon, Gino and Fred: Road Trip. First aired in October 2018

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Diners include Sherry, a 65-year-old dominatrix looking for romance. She hopes chartered surveyor and t'ai chi enthusiast John might be the man for her. Meanwhile, Hannah, 40, is looking for a man who shares her love of adventure. Could 42-year-old Christmas tree farmer Rob be her Mr Right?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hoping to enjoy a true spring break experience, Erica and Barry pay a visit to Pops in Florida, but the jaunt isn't what they expected. Adam tells the truth to his parents when he has a mishap with Beverly's new coat, but he gets a surprising reaction

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Adam worries about losing his friendship with Emmy when she starts dating a handsome older classmate, but his attempts to be cooler than the newcomer backfire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords wants to file an official complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he is off duty, but Captain Holt has other ideas. Peralta and Santiago glimpse the difficulties of parenthood when they babysit for Jeffords' children

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray is angered when he finds out that Adam has no interest in auditioning for a school stage production. Meanwhile, Beverly interferes with Erica's latest career plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray grow concerned about Adam's obsession with toys, so try to distract him with a new hobby. Meanwhile, Erica's band the Dropouts decide to audition for reality television talent show Star Search, but their egos threaten the band's future

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang's preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howard's mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The McQueens pull together to guard their secrets. Meanwhile, Victor wants Juliet to recruit some new dealers and sets his sights on little Ella

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff vows to rekindle Erica's interest in music, so she auditions for a college singing group. Beverly forces Adam and Murray to go camping together, hoping it will help them bond

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is given the chance to square off against the one actor from the Star Trek franchise he holds a grudge against - Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Leonard asks Penny to set Howard up on a date with one of her friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: The arrival of a 'relationship manager' causes ructions among the staff in an IT department - especially when they discover she knows nothing about computers. However, having a woman in the team soon proves to have its benefits. First episode of the comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Reynholm Industries announces a war on stress in the workplace, and the staff face their first battle as the office is set alight. Meanwhile, Roy suffers a sudden attack of kleptomania and Jen discovers her new shoes are two sizes too small, but still refuses to take them off. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

An encounter with the First inspires her to lead the potentials back to the Hellmouth and take on the horde of Ubervamps in a final decisive battle, while Willow prepares to cast the most powerful and dangerous spell of her life

programme.title: Angel
