Meanwhile, the Council of Watchers puts pressure on Wesley to hand the rogue Slayer over, and Wolfram & Hart send yet another assassin to finish the job. With guest stars Sarah Michelle Gellar and Eliza Dushku

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Complications ensue when Rick is forced to make good on his promise that Morty can have a new companion - his very own flying, fire-breathing dragon. Meanwhile, Jerry falls under the influence of a mysterious talking cat

programme.title: YOLO: Crystal Fantasy
programme.desc: Sarah is having negative vibes so she decides to holiday alone on Planet Bali. But when her rocket crashes on Planet Horoscope, she meets her own star sign, Capricorn, who decides to help her find a boyfriend

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: Animation about a jellyfish family and their human son. Reggie forgets everyone has gone to the annual Walla Walla Talent Show and assumes he is the last man left on Earth

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick battles with the sinister owner of the second-hand shop where Summer has a job, but Summer is upset about his interference. Jerry helps Morty with his science project about the solar system, but they can't agree on Pluto's planetary status. Guest starring Alfred Molina, Nolan North and Rich Fulcher

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.desc: Mum falls out with grandma over some new curtains, leaving it up to Adam to help settle their differences. Meanwhile, Adam's father drops the evening meal on the kitchen floor and scoops it back into the dish, hoping to keep his blunder a secret. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The siblings' father lands himself in trouble when his wife discovers he kept his stash of science magazines after the clear-out, so he pretends to burn them in the garden. Mum's best friend comes round to try on a new dress, and Jim is distraught after his dog disappears. Comedy, guest starring Tracy-Ann Oberman, with Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta, Boyle and Gina get involved in a Die Hard-type hostage situation while doing some off-duty shopping on Christmas Eve, so Jeffords is forced to leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted tires of having to take long trips to New Jersey to see Stella and is aghast when she tells him she wants to live there once they marry - resulting in a row. Meanwhile, Robin hands in her notice but has to grovel for her job back when she is turned down at an interview for another position

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted prepares to move to New Jersey and argues with Marshall over who should pay a bill for the flat. The friends also reminisce about years gone by, and Barney poses as an old man. With Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam is given two tickets to a Pittsburgh Steelers game by a client, and must choose whether to take Andi or Don. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam gets fed up with endless demands from his daughter's kindergarten teacher, Mrs Rodriguez, he makes a hasty decision that lands him in hot water with his wife Andi

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game and believes this represents his opportunity to play professionally, but he couldn't be more wrong. Meanwhile, Erica makes an important decision about her future in college

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie Spaceballs, but Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper. When Beverly and Pops come up for parents' weekend at college, Erica plans to tell them about an important decision she has made, but Murray surprises everyone by tagging along

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta goes to extremes trying to impress Santiago's father at Thanksgiving dinner. Boyle is on turkey duty, and Holt helps Pimento deal with no longer being able to work for the NYPD

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong hero. Gina wants to choose the location of the annual Boyle family vacation, and Santiago gets in the middle of a fight between Captain Holt and Kevin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster makes a scientific breakthrough at the dentist's office. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino and Georgie makes a big mistake when he is left in charge of the store

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster discovers that Mary has been keeping a secret about his future. Meemaw is furious when she learns Dale fired Georgie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy take a train ride to the Napa Valley with Howard and Bernadette on Valentine's Day, while Leonard and Penny head to the vets when they volunteer to look after Raj's dog. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD is admitted with a case of appendicitis, and gets to see the hospital from a patient's perspective - but makes it clear he does not trust Turk to operate on him. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: A patient irritates Dr Cox, who takes his anger out on JD, prompting Carla to leap to her intern's rescue. Meanwhile, Turk fights for the right to eat his lunch on a bench already claimed by Dr Kelso. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When JJ discovers that there's a sled hockey team made up entirely of people with disabilities, he immediately wants to join it, but Jimmy isn't thrilled because he thinks it's dangerous

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: As Christmas arrives, Maya surprises everyone by embracing a new-found holiday spirit. However, her mood is put to the test when the family's van is stolen, along with all their holiday gifts. Worried that he won't get into college, Ray tries to enhance his CV by joining the school choir. He is given a coveted solo spot but faces competition from JJ

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeant's exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry realises that as a future doctor, he should be more concerned about Murray's health, so he enlists the Jenkintown Posse and Coach Mellor to help get his father in shape. Meanwhile, Beverly is horrified to learn that Erica and Adam don't want any of the priceless heirlooms in her fancy, never-really-used living room

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry thinks he wants a wild, adult bachelor party, but he soon realises Adam's idea of a soiree to celebrate his brother as a bachelor is not to his liking. Murray never spends money on himself, so Beverly decides to surprise him with an expensive sports car

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the seventh series finale, Sheldon becomes upset about his career, the destruction of the comic-book store and Leonard and Penny's future living arrangements. Elsewhere, Howard is unable to keep hold of a carer for his mother. Comedy, staring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode from 2000. The arrival of Ben Davies makes an impression on Cindy and Mandy. Lewis and Finn prepare to open their new club, The Loft

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam's birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast. Erica begins working at Murray's furniture store to pay off her parking tickets

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Teenager Buffy Summers moves to the town of Sunnydale, where she hopes to put her destiny of single-handedly fighting the forces of darkness behind her - only to find her new home town is crawling with vampires. Supernatural drama, starring Sarah Michelle Gellar and Nicholas Brendon

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: A nerdy millionaire employs Angel to track down his blackmailer, but the investigation leads the sleuth into the crossfire of a gang war between street kids and vampires. Here, he meets Charles Gunn, a gangster-turned-vampire-hunter hoping to clear his neighbourhood of demons. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and J August Richards

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When 27 Ricks from alternate dimensions are murdered and their respective Mortys are kidnapped, Rick is framed for committing the crimes and must go after culprit - resulting in a fall-out with Morty

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of shows aired in October 2018. Programmes under consideration include This Morning at the Royal Wedding of Princess Eugenie, The Great Model Railway Challenge, The Last Leg, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve and Horizon - Avalanche: Making a Deadly Snowstorm

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nahida from Liverpool is searching for a man who shares her passion for food, and her date is with fellow Liverpudlian Thomas, who describes himself as a loveable bear. Ex-cruise ship worker Dale, 46, has been single for five years since his partner passed away, but is now ready to put his faith in Cupid again, and his date is 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie teams up with cider-maker Andy Thomstone to make a winter version of a popular drink, and demonstrates how to create the Italian favourite limoncello using leftover lemons

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lynda and Steve have worked hard all their lives, but now that their children have all flown the nest and both about to retire, they want to spend their time in their favourite part of Spain, Benalmádena. Jasmine Harman singles out five property options for their £125,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the north of Wales where they meet Sue, who is clearing out her late husband's antique shop stock. Henry manages to find a pedal car, while Simon takes a toy yacht

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Sue's house in Tiverton, Devon, finding a moped that brings back memories, and fighting over a petrol gauge that Simon O'Brien wants to upcycle into a clock

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Jayne and Alistair Lewis, a south Lanarkshire couple trying to self-build an innovative, barn-style home which can grow and shrink depending on their needs. They're constructing three connected pods which can be opened-up or shut-down to meet demand. Charlie has lots of suggestions for how to achieve the agricultural look they're after. The build gets off to a great start, but when money gets tight, Jayne and Alistair are left wondering whether they've made a mistake

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room B&B in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratt's at Ty'n Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheep's testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet to find out who earned the most and have it out with their rivals. Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elvira's coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. An outbreak of disease in the penguin colony leaves chick Munch fighting for his life. Sulawesi macaque Lisa gives birth and dad Mamassa is providing pretty useless, so older brother Beaker steps in to help with the babysitting. Andean spectacled bear Bernie is determined to woo Lima when she enters her short window of fertility, and young male tortoise Football muscles in on 71-year-old Bert's harem of females

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a family in Cullercoats in North Tyneside who are divided on whether they should sell their home or renovate their current property instead. Suze Drummond has emotional ties to their four-bed Victorian townhouse, but Mark wants to find a property with a better layout, bigger garden and a driveway for their car. Can Kirstie and Phil help them make the right decision?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to the Midlothian countryside to visit Pru and Richard Irvine, who planned to build a family home on an old industrial site. The biggest hurdles they faced were blending the property in with the landscape and working the long hours needed to manage the project. Kevin learns how this scheme fared and whether the locals' fears about an out-of-character building were proven valid

programme.title: The Kennedys: Tragedy & Triumph
programme.desc: Documentary charting the lives of Joseph and Rose Kennedy and their children, uncovering how and why this family so significantly impacted 20th century America, revealing how personal relationships within the Kennedy dynasty helped shape national and global events from the Cuban Missile Crisis to the struggle for civil rights legislation

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary about Thames Valley Police's investigation into the disappearance of 31-year-old mother of three Natalie Hemming on May 1, 2016. The programme has access to officers as they try to work out whether Natalie is alive or dead, and to her family and friends, struggling with the situation unfolding around them, before an arrest is made and the case reaches its conclusion

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-two-year-old retired firefighter John is airlifted to A&E after being accidentally hit in the face with a golf club, which hit him so hard that it snapped. With a suspected critical head injury, he is sent for a CT scan, and doctors are concerned that his right eye is not reacting as it should and he is weak down the right-hand side of his body. Meanwhile, 77-year-old Joan arrives in St George's after falling down the stairs at home and hurting her leg. As she waits to be treated, she talks about growing up in Camberwell

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, a man requires urgent medical care after falling from his motorbike. The medics scramble to the Lake District when a walker goes into a cardiac arrest on Ullswater

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of the day a gunman entered a bank in Cincinnati and opened fire, featuring the calls made by those caught up in the atrocity

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-two-year-old retired firefighter John is airlifted to A&E after being accidentally hit in the face with a golf club, which hit him so hard that it snapped. With a suspected critical head injury, he is sent for a CT scan, and doctors are concerned that his right eye is not reacting as it should and he is weak down the right-hand side of his body. Meanwhile, 77-year-old Joan arrives in St George's after falling down the stairs at home and hurting her leg. As she waits to be treated, she talks about growing up in Camberwell

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Nidderdale agricultural show in the Yorkshire Dales, where she learns how to make her own pork pies and sausages. However, her success jeopardised by problems the evening before the event

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Mal and Sue from Suffolk, who are looking to retire to Spain. She shows them five properties around Vera, hoping one will fall within their budget of £70,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find an antique cannon in a North Wales dealer's storage shed, as well as giving restorer Gemma a crash course in croquet

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien come across a gramophone and a stow-away bed to restore. Meanwhile, Simon accidently puts his foot through a drum

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to North Somerset, where he helps Antony and Hayley Wild build a contemporary four-bedroom home overlooking the Severn estuary. Having waited 26 years to finally build their own house, maths teacher Hayley and professional project manager Antony are aiming high. However, the budget cannot keep pace with their ambitions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Who'd a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where partners Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin hope to impress their fellow guests. On arrival, Liz and Brian are excited over their two hot tubs, and Jackie and Paul are more than happy with the complimentary champagne. However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. However, Jackie and Paul are unimpressed by their small room, and Joe and Alex find the cleanliness levels lacking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where B&B newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. They take their guests to a local maze in the afternoon and, after an uncomfortable night's sleep for Alex, some of the breakfast orders are misplaced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine welcome their guests to The Great Trewern B&B, Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where they enjoy the quiet life. Joe and Alex feel far away from it all, but the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress the other guests. At dinner, talk turns to first impressions and it appears it is all water under the bridge for Jackie and Joe, but she remains upset with the feedback Matthew and Liam gave her

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one final time to find out what they have been paid. Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin kick things off by confronting Matthew Bracegirdle and Liam Halewood about their comments regarding the cleanliness of their establishment, and Jackie and Paul Langshaw complain about their poor breakfast score

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger Kirana faces losing her two cubs, who are fully grown and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. Indonesian dwarf buffalo Oana, one of Chester's most sensitive animals, gives birth - only for the new mum's anxiety to threaten the calf's health

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple Jamie Lea and Curtis in Albrighton in Shropshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Jamie Lea wants to settle down and enjoy family life in their three-bed terrace, but Curtis wants a bigger house with a better garden in the countryside for their growing family

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel transforms the attic into a studio and storage space for her vintage treasures and takes Dorothy on a trip to Paris, while Dick has his own plans for repurposing some ancient tools he finds in the outbuildings. The couple throws a surprise birthday celebration for Angel's mother, where Dick's purpose-built open-fire popcorn maker is put to the test

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Ian and Sophie Cooper, who aim to restore a 200-year-old industrial building in Somerset. The couple plan to build a large glass extension to make the most of the incredible views on offer, but run into trouble when they learn the building has no foundations

programme.title: A Year in the New Forest
programme.desc: An unexpected heatwave leaves the forest facing its hottest early summer in decades, leading to an invasion of flies and other insects. While many animals, including ponies, cattle and deer fawns, struggle to cope with the intense heat, it proves a blessing for others - not least the forest's many species of rare butterflies. As the pace of life slows, the human residents are given a welcome opportunity to reflect on what makes the unique area so special and fragile

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: After falling over during the night at home and being rushed into A&E, 85-year-old Maura faces potentially life-changing injuries. CT scans reveal broken bones in her spine, and her son and daughter-in-law must decide when to share the gravity of the situation with Maura and her granddaughter Meg. Meanwhile, 37-year-old doctor Jim arrives at St George's after a collision with a van while he was cycling to work. Despite putting on a brave face, scans reveal his injuries are more serious than first thought. Plus, a chef is treated after cutting her thumb while chopping peppers at home

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack is declared dead after drinking too much floor polish - and Ted is astounded to learn he has been left a fortune in the will. However, he has to fulfil certain conditions before collecting the money

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Sarah Millican and Rob Beckett. Susie Dent presides in Dictionary Corner, ably assisted by Vic Reeves, and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: The Accident
programme.desc: The inquest opens, and questions are asked of Iwan, Alan and Harriet. Polly is asked to betray Iwan to get the evidence the victims' families need, while Harriet's boss faces her with an impossible choice - with devastating results for Tim. Drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, Mark Lewis-Jones, Sidse Babett Knudsen, Nabhaan Rizwan and Kai Owen

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: A family trip to the Cincinnati Zoo turns into chaos and horror as a three-year-old falls into the enclosure of Harambe, the silverback gorilla

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Alison and her daughter Paula are looking for a holiday home that feels traditionally Spanish. Presenter Jasmine Harman shows them five properties around Velez-Malaga for their budget of £60,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon O'Brien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel transforms the attic into a studio and storage space for her vintage treasures and takes Dorothy on a trip to Paris, while Dick has his own plans for repurposing some ancient tools he finds in the outbuildings. The couple throws a surprise birthday celebration for Angel's mother, where Dick's purpose-built open-fire popcorn maker is put to the test

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton revisits Liz and Robin Leonard, who planed to self-build a three-bedroom home in Hastings, East Sussex, with a view of the coast. However, they chose to ignore every piece of advice he gave them and their outlandish ideas led to lavish spending

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Four Sumatran orang-utans escape from their quarters, and tempting them back inside proves easier said than done, while the dominant female meerkat faces trouble from her daughter, who is launching physical attacks upon her mother. A young Asian elephant keeps the rest of the herd entertained as they adapt to the loss of two members to a virus. The keepers believe it needs a playmate its own age, but their hopes rest on the bull elephant mating with the females once more

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their family's future

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel redesigns the rooms in one of the chateau's turrets with a fruits and flowers motif - but an unexpected surprise lurks behind her creations. Outside, Dick is putting together a parkour fitness trail in the 12 acres of grounds, but hits upon an unexpected obstacle buried deep underground

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Londoner Chris Ostwald decides to build a New England-style water mill in the Chilterns, on a hill and nowhere near any water, after being inspired by an illustration on a yoghurt pot. He bought the plot 20 years previously and it has always been his dream to build a retreat for himself and his family. Everything seems to be going smoothly, until a neighbour complains the house is breaking its planning consent. Kevin McCloud presents

programme.title: 23 Cases
programme.desc: Tara receives an anonymous warning to stop further investigation into the murders, but she is not deterred. Only Rapp knows who sent the message - and he can't resist digging for more about Tara's personal life, leaving her feeling exposed. Thriller, starring Shadi Hedayati and Franz Dinda. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St George's as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Arun's attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug aren't successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to A&E after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Cambridgeshire, the heli-medics race to treat a young cyclist with a time-critical brain injury. On the Norfolk Broads, holidaymaker Tom breaks his thigh bone jumping off a boat, while Cedric, an 87-year-old pilot, is put into an induced coma after he crashes his microlight in Cumbria

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May visit Albania to test three luxury vehicles - the Rolls-Royce Ghost, Bentley Mulsanne and Mercedes-Benz S65 AMG. Jeremy also drives three high-performance hatchbacks in the form of the limited-edition Ford Focus RS500, Prodrive-developed Cosworth Impreza STi CS400 and one-off Volvo C30 PPC. Jonathan Ross is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters square up to their Australian counterparts in an automotive version of the Ashes, with challenges including rallying, drifting and a double-decker car race. Jeremy Clarkson also test-drives the Ferrari 599 GTO, and Boris Becker gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on another round of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, beginning with Portuguese capital Lisbon. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes with hints of cinnamon and freshly chopped coriander from the east and tomatoes and chillies from the Americas. Rick is inspired to cook salt cod fritters and an almond tart, before heading for the St Anthony's Day Parade and Sardine Festival

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May shop for second-hand convertibles, uncovering the pitfalls to avoid when buying a used car, and Jeremy also gets the opportunity to test-drive the Pagani Zonda R. Actor Simon Pegg takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond tackle the traffic chaos snowy weather causes in Britain, and hit upon a solution involving a combine harvester, some rudimentary engineering skills and a trip to Norway. Jeremy also tests the Audi RS5 and the BMW M3, and American actress and model Amber Heard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Twenty Twelve co-stars Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes pair up again to go on a road trip through the former Soviet republic of Georgia. Driving from the border with Azerbaijan to the Black Sea, Jessica soon discovers her spirit of adventure is causing Hugh a few moments of high anxiety, but there is worse to come when they find themselves stuck on a high mountain pass in bad weather and he has to overcome his vertigo. While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of New Nordic cuisine - Copenhagen - where he goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers. He's cheered to find plenty of traditional favourites, such as the city's famous Smorrebrod open sandwiches on rye bread, delicious poached turbot with cabbage and lemon butter sauce and - of course - the ubiquitous Danish pastry. Back at home, Rick cooks fried pork belly with lovage potatoes and parsley sauce, which has been voted Denmark's favourite dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Jaguar XJ and races against the rotation of the Earth. James May travels to America to drive a Nasa Space Exploration Vehicle and Richard Hammond tests two of the most famous supercars of the 1980s - the Porsche 959 and the Ferrari F40. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of the Ferrari F12 Berlinetta, sampling the punch of its 730bhp V12 engine on the open roads of Scotland. Richard Hammond harnesses the power of motorsport on a quest to find the world's best taxi, and James May pays tribute to the former BBC Television Centre in White City, London, using a motorcyclist and a pair of parkour runners. Plus, the BAC Mono - an astonishingly fast car with just one seat - is put through its paces on the test track, and film director Ron Howard goes for a spin in the new Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous 'Road of Death', only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Cadiz in Spain, where he samples two of the city's most revered culinary stars - fresh tuna and Manzanilla sherry. Rick is captivated by the narrow winding streets as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders, whose influence on the city can still be seen to this day. Back home, he prepares flamenco eggs and arroz verde, or green rice, made with garlic, parsley, clams and prawns, producing the vibrant colours of the Spanish flag

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. The distress signal is sent directly to Jeremy Clarkson and James May, who get their hands on two machines and set off on an epic adventure to find their colleague. Plus, Jeremy puts the new 471bhp Lexus RC F coupe thought its paces, while The Fall and The X-Files star Gillian Anderson takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May straps into a highly tuned hatchback as he competes in a world rallycross race, with Top Gear USA host and professional driver Tanner Foust teaming up with him. Jeremy Clarkson puts the latest Jaguar F-type R and Eagle's modernised E-type the Low Drag GT though their paces, while Richard Hammond is in Spain to test the new version of the Mazda MX-5. Plus, X-Men: First Class star Nicholas Hoult takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake journeys on some of the most perilous routes in the world. In Alaska, Sue Perkins and Charley Boorman drive along the notorious Dalton Highway, a dirt track originally constructed in the 1970s as a supply road for the Trans-Alaska oil pipeline. The pair struggle to cope with the Arctic conditions and constant threat of avalanches, but receive help from experienced truckers who teach them some unwritten rules for surviving the road's many hazards

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Richard Osman hosts as presenter Kelly Cates, actor Tyger Drew-Honey, comedian Desiree Burch and journalist Matt Allwright test their general knowledge skills

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts another round of the peculiar panel quiz and finds out how much Professor Brian Cox, Rhys Darby, Jason Manford and regular panellist Alan Davies know about justice, awarding points for the most interesting answers

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition. Question master Stephen Fry continues the comedy panel quiz's exploration of subjects beginning with the letter L as he asks a range of fiendish questions about literature and language. Stand-up comedian Lloyd Langford joins Bad Education star Jack Whitehall, Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell and regular panellist Alan Davies

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show, with regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack joined by Rebecca Front, Jack Whitehall, Nick Hewer and Miranda Hart, who try to deceive their opponents with plausible lies and absurd facts about themselves

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his boss's wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantino's crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain hosts a 2011 edition of the comedy quiz, as guests Alun Cochrane, Micky Flanagan, Milton Jones and Zoe Lyons join panellists Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons to offer opinions on world events

programme.title: Mock the Week

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Croupier Tomasz Wisniewski hosts the second dinner party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire. His 'outrageous'-themed evening leaves plenty of scope for his guests' imaginations, but his balloon-pumping competition brings out the competitive streak in one contestant

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Gareth Harding hosts the third dinner party from Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, where he provides an Ibiza-themed night after he transforms his garden into a Balearic cocktail bar and club complete with lasers and disco lights. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Animal lover Rachel Imms hosts the fourth party of the week from Mansfield. She opts for a French-themed evening, but her complicated main course proves to be a challenge, and her accordionist entertainer does not appeal to everyone in the way she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance fanatic Julia Smith hosts the final party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, and is confident she will wow fellow competitors with her fancy house and hospitality, having roped in two waiters to give the evening a touch of class. programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty-four-year-old plumber Jamie hasn't had a proper girlfriend for almost 10 years. His date, Leigh, is seeking someone muscley and good with his hands. Shelly is a 57-year-old personal trainer who has been single for seven years. Her date is David, a 61-year-old retired firefighter who's been single for four years. Father-of-two Nathan has had a successful career in sales. His date Lisa seeks someone 'nicer' than the guys she usually dates. Last into the restaurant is 27-year-old steampunk enthusiast Joe. His date is 29-year-old Jess, who used to work at the Black Country Living Museum

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Now 37, health and diet consultant Charlotte feels that time is running out for her to settle down and have a baby. Her parents, Patricia and Terry, hand the keys of their Surrey mansion to their daughter so she can help find a potential suitor, inviting a mountain-bagging explorer, a gym owner, a fashion boss, a recruitment consultant and a former golf professional to move in alongside her in a bid to kindle romance. Aware that Charlotte has a track record for being drawn to unsuitable 'bad boys', they also resolve to pop over at unexpected moments during the week to check out her choices

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Annie and Sherri-Leigh buy a house in the Welsh Valleys at auction and then have six months to renovate it before trying to sell it for a profit. Simon O'Brien presents

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: All-American mother and former barrister Natashka Ingham hosts the final dinner party from Lincolnshire, and hopes to impress her guests with a theme of The Great American Dream. In the first episode, the 12 get to know each other, including Billie, the daughter of TV presenter Trisha Goddard, Covid-19 survivor Tara, and the oldest member of the team, 60-year-old Sly. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A man has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Car thieves steal a BMW and as they lead officers in a high speed chase across north London their attempts to escape become more and more desperate. Another driver is spotted swerving across the motorway, and the Interceptors find him to be four times over the drink driving limit. Meanwhile, a group of teenagers is pulled over for a routine stop-and-search, and found to be armed and ready for any encounter

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The unit's hi-tech helicopter is called on to help pursue a motorcyclist riding at speeds of up to 130mph and showing no sign of slowing down for oncoming traffic or police cars. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: CSI: NY

Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers find a thumb in some rubbish while investigating a fire bombing in Little Italy. Unable to convince a witness to testify against their main suspect, they hope that identifying the thumb will provide them with some evidence. Meanwhile, Oliver helps Andy prepare her defence at Duncan's dismissal hearing. However, when Duncan produces new evidence that shifts all the blame on to Andy, Oliver must decide if he is willing to compromise his professional integrity - and his friendship with Andy - to save her career. Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith star

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a prostitute leaves an eminent plastic surgeon as the most obvious culprit. However, Kincaid suspects otherwise, and sets out to discover whether the man was framed

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Curtis, McCoy and Kincaid witness the execution of a criminal they helped bring to justice, but the event culminates in personal tragedies for each of them

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy widow and her daughter are implicated in the death of a hitman out on parole - and it's up to the squad to find out whether the pair hired the victim to kill a rich relative. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The first instalment of a two-part crossover with NCIS: New Orleans sees the Washington, DC team co-operating with their colleagues from the Big Easy to investigate a spate of lethal poisonings on board a New Orleans-to-DC flight. All the evidence seems to point to missing chef Luca, who happens to be Abby's brother, so the two investigative services join forces to locate him, and find out why a private tech firm seems to have been targetted by the killer. Naval crime drama, guest starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly car explosion in DC that seems to be connected to Special Agent Nick Torres's disappearance six months earlier while on a deep-cover operation in Argentina

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS detectives uncover a bomb plot and a long-running theft ring while investigating a death at a Quantico reunion. Elsewhere, Torres and Quinn adjust to life on Gibbs' team, but find new seating arrangements in the squad room just one of the things causing tension to mount. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the NCIS team investigates a marine sergeant's fall to her death from a building, her doctor, Dr Grace Confalone, confides in Gibbs urging him to consider this a murder investigation. Meanwhile, Torres searches for a place to live

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team responds to the reported kidnapping of a 16-year-old girl at a party - and her disappearance could be linked with her boyfriend's gang associations. Elsewhere, Benson has a ceremony to decree her becoming the new SVU sergeant. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team members search for a missing diabetic child who also suffers from an attachment disorder. A shocking confession from the youngster's mother leads them to a couple of known sex offenders, and the detectives face a race against time to find the kid before he falls into a coma. Meanwhile, Benson is preoccupied by a pregnancy scare. Guest starring Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: William Lewis holds Benson in captivity while the squad desperately searches for clues to her location, and as days pass by, it seems increasingly unlikely they will find her - but a string of rapes and murders finally gives them a clue. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims about well-being made in the media

programme.title: Callan

programme.title: Macbeth (1997)
programme.desc: A general in medieval Scotland is told by three witches that he is destined to become king, so plots to murder the current monarch and seize the throne. However, once he has taken the crown he is consumed by paranoia, and goes to terrible lengths to ensure his reign continues. Shakespeare's tragedy, starring Jason Connery and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Crimes at the Dark House ()
programme.desc: A criminal murders an aristocrat, planning to assume his identity - but is disappointed to discover the man he has replaced is heavily in debt. He then plots to marry a wealthy heiress for her fortune, but is forced to kill anyone who comes close to learning his true identity. Horror based on Wilkie Collins' The Woman in White, starring Tod Slaughter and Sylvia Marriott

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash and Machin must dispose of a bomb in a school - only to find another device close by, forcing them to split up and defuse one each

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: A retrospective review of Bowie's classic album, featuring extensive interviews with Woody Woodmansey and the late Trevor Bolder

programme.title: London Live Film Festival

programme.title: Lost in London (2017)
programme.desc: In a recreation of a true story, the first film beamed live to cinemas as it was shot, actor Woody Harrelson embarks on a wild night out in London. He bumps into friends like Owen Wilson and Daniel Radcliffe before ending the night in prison. Comedy filmed in one-take by director and star Harrelson, with Eleanor Matsuura

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love (2015)
programme.desc: A married woman has an affair with a co-worker, only for him to be sucked into a mysterious hole that suddenly appears in her home. She has to find a way to get him out of this strange imprisonment without anyone learning about their secret relationship. Sci-fi romantic comedy, starring Alison Brie and Justin Chatwin

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: An insight into how the cessation of open hostilities between Unionist and Nationalists factions in Northern Ireland led to an underground war between militant groups

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)

programme.title: Live UEFA Nations League
programme.desc: England v Denmark (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Group A2 match at Wembley Stadium, as Gareth Southgate's side look for three vital points in their Nations League campaign. The reverse fixture saw a rather tepid game end in a goalless draw in Copenhagen, but that result does mean that England are unbeaten against Kasper Hjulmand's side in three matches, a run that stretches back to August 2005.

programme.title: Fire in Babylon (2010)
programme.desc: Documentary about the West Indian cricket team in the 1970s. Under the captaincy of Clive Lloyd, the team enjoyed a run of international success. programme.desc: The CJ Cup. Further coverage of day one of the tournament, held at the Shadow Creek Golf Course in Las Vegas, Nevada. Justin Thomas won this tournament last year for the second time in three years, although he did finish one shot short of the tournament record held by fellow American Brooks Koepka. Thomas' round of 20-under-par saw him finish two strokes clear of New Zealand's Danny Lee last year.

programme.desc: Revisiting Pittsburgh Steelers' 2005 Super Bowl triumph over Seattle Seahawks at Ford Field in Detroit, Michigan. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at New Orleans Saints' 2009 Super Bowl triumph over Indianapolis Colts at the Sun Life Stadium in Miami, Florida. Despite trailing 10-6 at the half-time interval, the Saints rallied in the second half to secure a 31-17 victory, claiming their first Super Bowl title in the process
